allOf.description: Top-level wrapper for a chat interface. Provides layout structure (header, message area, input) for a complete chat experience. Key properties: height (CSS value, default 100%), title (optional header), children (required). User-Writable: false.

title.description: Optional header title displayed above the message area

allOf.description: Scrollable container for chat messages. Automatically scrolls to the bottom when new messages are added. Use a ChildList template with a data model path (e.g. /messages) to render messages dynamically. User-Writable: false.

children.description: Scrollable container for chat messages. Auto-scrolls to bottom on new messages. Use ChildList template with path /messages.

allOf.description: Renders a single chat message bubble. Styled differently based on role (user, assistant, system). Key properties: role (required), content (required), timestamp (optional ISO 8601). User-Writable: false.

Text input field with a send button for composing chat messages. Emits user input as an action. Key properties: placeholder (default 'Type a message...'), disabled (to block input while agent is processing). User-Writable: true.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text for the input field

disabled.description: Whether the input is disabled (e.g., while agent is processing)

allOf.description: Animated typing indicator shown while the agent is generating a response. Key properties: visible (show/hide, default false), text (label, default 'Thinking...'). User-Writable: false.

visible.description: Whether to show the typing indicator

allOf.description: Renders streaming token-by-token output from the agent. Appends each new token value to an internal buffer and displays the accumulated text. Key properties: token (latest emitted token), active (whether stream is live, default false). User-Writable: false.

token.description: Latest token emitted by the agent. The component appends each new value to its internal buffer and renders the accumulated text.

active.description: Whether the stream is currently active. When set to false the component freezes its buffer.
